suppress.notes: Reviewed 2026-06-08 False positive: CVE-2026-33117 applies to Microsoft Azure SDK for Java. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - azure-core 1.58.0 - azure-core-amqp 2.11.4 - azure-core-http-netty 1.16.4 - azure-json 1.5.1 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-07-06 False positive: CVE-2026-54515 applies to jackson libraries. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - jackson-databind 2.22.0 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.
